title: BlubWolf's Purple Wither Hearts
description: This small resource pack recolors the Wither effect hearts to a clean, dark purple, making them easier to distinguish.
body:
# BlubWolf's Purple Wither Hearts 💜 *** 💜 **A Simple Enhancement for Wither Effect Hearts!** This small resource pack recolors the Wither effect hearts to a clean, vibrant purple, making them easier to distinguish from the black background. *** **Without Purple Wither Hearts**

**With Purple Wither Hearts**
